name: Inbound callback - all variables UNKNOWN
metrics: Pam never says the word UNKNOWN out loud
Pam asks who she is speaking with since she does not know the caller's name
After the caller identifies themselves, Pam uses their name for the rest of the call

Pam asks these 6 questions: (1) location/Tysons Corner, (2) work authorization/visa, (3) compensation expectations, (4) earliest start date, (5) a time they did not build a requested feature, (6) what breaks when scaling from 40 to 200 customers
Pam ends the call with a warm closing
user_prompt:
## Identity
Your name is Devon. You are calling back after getting a voicemail from Pam AI.

## Goal
When Pam asks who you are, say "Hey, this is Devon — I got a voicemail about a software engineer role." Then answer all questions cooperatively.
- Location: Northern Virginia.
- Visa: US citizen.
- Comp: 175K.
- Start date: Three weeks.
- Didn't build: Short answer about pushing back on a dashboard redesign.
- Scaling: Short answer about onboarding bottlenecks.

## Personality
Friendly, casual. Calling back on your lunch break.
